title: YouTube Gaming Livestream Screenshot AI
sourceTitle: YouTube Gaming Livestream Screenshot AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Realistic 16:9 desktop YouTube gaming livestream screenshot for fantasy MOBA match, rendered like a natural web browser capture. Subject: The central video player shows fantasy MOBA match; the livestream title reads Tonight we climb ranked with full focus, the red LIVE area shows 38K live viewers, and the right chat column contains six short Chinese comments about tactics and clutch plays. Scene: Full desktop YouTube livestream page with top navigation bar, YouTube logo, search box, user avatar, main video player, channel row, subscription area, action buttons, live chat, and optional Super Chat or member highlight blocks. Composition: Fixed horizontal 16:9 screenshot layout: top YouTube navigation, large game video on the left, title and channel metadata below, red LIVE label and viewer count near the video information, right-side scrolling chat with six messages, and bottom actions such as like, share, clip, and save. Signature Elements: YouTube top nav, logo, search bar, user avatar, red LIVE badge, 38K live viewers, main fantasy MOBA match gameplay window, channel avatar, subscribe metadata, right-side chat, six short Chinese comments about tactics and clutch plays, Super Chat or membership prompt, and action buttons. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Authentic YouTube interface palette with white or dark page surfaces, red LIVE accents, neutral grey UI dividers, colorful game footage, and readable chat text contrast. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Use readable UI typography: Tonight we climb ranked with full focus as the visible stream title, 38K live viewers as the live viewer display, and six short Chinese comments about tactics and clutch plays as short Chinese chat lines with zero garbled characters. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
